name: Tomatoes, Corn, and Cheese on Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the flour in a heavy skillet and remove it, blending with 2 tablespoons of the fat.
2. Brown the onion in the remaining fat.
3. Add the other ingredients (except the cheese) to the skillet and cook for about 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the melted cheese and serve over thin crisp toast.
